name: Cinnabon Cinnamon Rolls ABM
recipeIngredient: Instant vanilla pudding mix: 1/2 package (3.4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ingredients in your bread machine according to its specifications. Set for the dough cycle (approximately 1 hr. 40 minutes in a Hitachi B101). After completion, remove the dough and roll it out to a rectangle measuring about 17 x 10 inches.
2. Filling: Mix together softened butter, brown sugar, and ground cinnamon.
3. Spread the filling mixture evenly over the rolled dough.
4. Roll the dough tightly from the long end, pinching the edges closed when finished.
5. Slice the rolls into halves (or larger if desired) and place them in greased cake pans (e.g., 3 - 9-inch pans).
6. Let the rolls rise until doubled in size.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Do not overbake.
8. Frosting: Spread a warm frosting onto the baked rolls. They are best enjoyed fresh, but can be reheated for 10-15 seconds in the microwave if desired.
Note: Adjustments such as adding chopped nuts to the filling and doubling the cinnamon were made by the original author. The rolls were also sliced into smaller pieces and placed in a non-stick baking pan, resulting in about 10 large rolls. A homemade frosting was created using powdered sugar, softened butter, vanilla, and milk.
